{"society_power": 5.0, "state_power": 7.5, "society_change": 1.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Liberal reforms constraining executive; franchise expansion", "reasoning": "Constitutional/electoral reforms of the early 1870s (re-election ban, 1874 franchise expansion) and parliamentary erosion of presidentialism strengthened organized elite and urban society's ability to constrain the executive, raising society from 4.0 to 5.0. State power holds at 7.5 as fiscal growth, railways, legal codification, and Araucan\u00eda/frontier expansion offset the mid-decade downturn and the internal shift of authority from executive to Congress."}
